title: sorghum vulgare var. nigricans
intro: Sorghum vulgare var. nigricans, also known as black sorghum or broomcorn, is a variant of the sorghum plant, characterized by its dark-colored seeds and tall stature. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of sorghum vulgare var. nigricans include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it is also used as a food ingredient in some cultures, particularly in Africa and Asia.
